name: workunit-sides-count-cap
description: `sides.count` is capped at 4 (§5.5): `sides` exists for distinct anatomical sides (typically 2, occasionally more for genuinely multi-limb patterns), not as a mechanism for repeated same-limb efforts with rest between — that pattern belongs to `Block.grouping: cluster` (§5.4) with child `WorkUnit`s carrying `setRole: cluster` instead.
